name: WildType
short_description: Can typing be as satisfying as a fighting game? WildType reshapes your writing experience with wild visual effects and 90s retro design. Whether it's Markdown notes, typing practice, or fun mini-games, every keystroke is full of rhythm. Join WildType today and define your own "violent aesthetics."
detailed_description:
WildType is a unique app that blends Retro Style with Powerful Feedback. It is built for both typing practice and creative writing.

Our goal is simple:

—— "Make typing feel as exciting as a fighting game."

 Key Features

  • Typing with "Impact"

    Enjoy high-energy visual effects and finishers. Every keystroke feels like a move in a fighting game, turning writing into a rhythmic experience.

  •  Retro Desktop Style

    A tribute to the classic Windows 95 look.

  •  Pro Markdown Support

    Beautiful and powerful. Full support for Markdown helps you take notes and create content quickly and efficiently.

 Master Your "Muscle Memory"

  • Improve Your Skills:

    Use the built-in practice system to increase your speed while enjoying cool effects.

  • Typing Calendar:

    Track your history and daily progress. Watch yourself grow from a beginner into a pro.

  • Built-in Input Methods:

    Supports Pinyin, Wubi, and more. Meet your Chinese input needs without installing extra software.

 Developer’s Message

If you love mechanical keyboards, writing, or indie games, give WildType a try.

Please add it to your Wishlist—it truly helps independent developers!

supported_languages: Simplified Chinese, English, Japanese, Traditional Chinese, Korean
